mapper.select: /** UsptRsltIdxIemCnHistDao.selectList */ select uriich.rslt_hist_id , uriich.rslt_idx_iem_cn_id , uriic.rslt_idx_detail_iem_id , ubridi.detail_iem_nm , uriic.rslt_idx_std_iem_id , ubrisi.std_iem_nm , uriich.rslt_idx_iem_cn , case when ubrisi.rslt_idx_std_iem_id is null then ubridi.iem_unit_cd else ubrisi.iem_unit_cd end as iem_unit_cd from uspt_rslt_idx_iem_cn_hist uriich inner join uspt_rslt_idx_iem_cn uriic on uriic.rslt_idx_iem_cn_id = uriich.rslt_idx_iem_cn_id inner join uspt_bsns_rslt_idx_detail_iem ubridi on ubridi.rslt_idx_detail_iem_id = uriic.rslt_idx_detail_iem_id left outer join uspt_bsns_rslt_idx_std_iem ubrisi on ubrisi.rslt_idx_std_iem_id = uriic.rslt_idx_std_iem_id where uriich.rslt_hist_id = #{rsltHistId} and uriich.rslt_idx_iem_id = #{rsltIdxIemId} order by uriic.rslt_idx_detail_iem_id, uriic.rslt_idx_std_iem_id
